text: The Codex Super-App full beginners guide. Riley frames Codex as the all-purpose interface for AI agents. Part 1 covers installing Codex, projects, chats, documents, plugins, custom skills, automations, image generation, MCP, mini-windows, steering vs queueing agents, custom skills with APIs, YouTube researcher skill, and scheduled automation with a custom skill. Part 2 shows multitasking across iOS app design, mobile app build, landing page, investor deck, launch video, and social media automation using Supabase, Tally, Remotion, Canva, Vercel, Typefully, and TestFlight.
Andrew Mayne says @rileybrown has been making great Codex content and links a YouTube tutorial titled Learn 95% of Codex in 30 minutes.
Learn 95% of Codex in 28 minutes. Riley presents seven knowledge-work capabilities inside Codex as a super-app, including full file access, persistent memory, plugins, and skills.
